TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: aicu a Viet (Vinietan: người Việt) zuku nuaya mavan na i Vietnam a kaizuanan. nasepaljavak tjai Vietnam, Kanata, Taiwan, Drupun, Kuria, Tailiku, katjai Kamucea a Viet zuku. supu a supu nua Viet a caucau tucu, izua man 86,000,000 sakaizua, qau tjaljatjuruvuan a i pinui Vietnam an a Viet a caucau. pungadan a caucau Hồ Chí Minh Nguyễn Trãi Lý Thái Tổ Ngô Đình Diệm pacunu uta Kam == kaizuanan ==
S.PHON: aiʦu a viət (viniətan: ŋ**i vi*t) zuku nuaja mavan na i viətnam a kaizuanan. nasəpaʎavak ʦai viətnam, kanata, taiwan, ɖupun, kuria, taiɭiku, kaʦai kamuʦəa a viət zuku. supu a supu nua viət a ʦauʦau tuʦu, izua man **,***,*** sakaizua, qau ʦaʎaʦuruvuan a i pinui viətnam an a viət a ʦauʦau. puŋadan a ʦauʦau h* ʦh* minh ŋuj*n tr*i ɭ* th*i t* ŋ* **nh di*m paʦunu uta kam == kaizuanan ==
S.FORM: aicu a Viet (Vinietan: người Việt) zuku nuaya mavan na i Vietnam a kaizuanan. nasepaljavak tjai Vietnam, Kanata, Taiwan, Drupun, Kuria, Tailiku, katjai Kamucea a Viet zuku. supu a supu nua Viet a caucau tucu, izua man 86,000,000 sakaizua, qau tjaljatjuruvuan a i pinui Vietnam an a Viet a caucau. pungadan a caucau Hồ Chí Minh Nguyễn Trãi Lý Thái Tổ Ngô Đình Diệm pacunu uta Kam == kaizuanan ==
S.PHON: aiʦu a viət (viniətan: ŋ**i vi*t) zuku nuaja mavan na i viətnam a kaizuanan. nasəpaʎavak ʦai viətnam, kanata, taiwan, ɖupun, kuria, taiɭiku, kaʦai kamuʦəa a viət zuku. supu a supu nua viət a ʦauʦau tuʦu, izua man **,***,*** sakaizua, qau ʦaʎaʦuruvuan a i pinui viətnam an a viət a ʦauʦau. puŋadan a ʦauʦau h* ʦh* minh ŋuj*n tr*i ɭ* th*i t* ŋ* **nh di*m paʦunu uta kam == kaizuanan ==
